
# (PART) Results {-}

# Community Composition and Diversity

```{r setup-0400-results}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.path = "fig/0400-results/", dev = "png")
```

<!-- Taxonomic summary: total taxa, major orders.
     Density calculations.
     Diversity indices: Shannon, Simpson, richness, evenness.
     EPT richness and relative abundance.
     Functional feeding group composition.
     Hilsenhoff Biotic Index. -->
